domain_archetypes.name: evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: source evidence changes while workflow context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: handoff boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: claim regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: claim behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: review operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: review output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
